# Entities Index

Navigation: [[index]] | [[concepts/_index|Concepts]] | [[sources/_index|Sources]]

All entity pages — people, organizations, products, and tools.

---

## People

- [[Andrej Karpathy]] — AI researcher, educator; originated the LLM Wiki pattern

---

## Organizations

- [[Tencent Cloud Copilot]] — cloud LLM API service

---

## Products & Tools

- [[Antigravity Tools]] — local API proxy to Tencent Cloud Copilot
- [[LM Studio]] — GUI-based local LLM runner
- [[oMLX]] — Apple Silicon optimized inference engine
- [[OptiQ]] — mixed-precision quantization tool
- [[Google ADK]] — Google's Agent Development Kit for building production AI agents

---

## Add new entities here as they are identified during ingests.
